requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety and SAFETY Mark Scope
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全与 SAFETY Mark 适用范围
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全與 SAFETY Mark 適用範圍

summary.en: Singapore operates on a 230 V, 50 Hz single-phase grid, the same 50 Hz frequency as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V. Electrical safety for in-scope household power tools is enforced through the Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Registration Scheme administered by Enterprise Singapore, which requires a SAFETY Mark for Controlled Goods obtained via a Singapore-based Registered Supplier. The accepted safety basis is the SS/IEC 62841 series for hand-held, transportable, and lawn and garden tools, with the charger or external power supply assessed against the relevant safety standard.
summary.zh: 新加坡采用 230 V、50 Hz 单相电网，频率与中国同为 50 Hz，但标称电压不同于中国的 220/380 V。范围内家用电动工具的电气安全通过企业发展局管理的《消费者保护（安全要求）注册计划》执行，需通过新加坡本地注册供应商取得受控产品的 SAFETY Mark。可接受的安全依据为面向手持、可移式及园林工具的 SS/IEC 62841 系列，充电器或外置电源按相关安全标准评估。
summary.zht: 新加坡採用 230 V、50 Hz 單相電網，頻率與中國同為 50 Hz，但標稱電壓不同於中國的 220/380 V。範圍內家用電動工具的電氣安全透過企業發展局管理的《消費者保護（安全要求）註冊計劃》執行，需透過新加坡本地註冊供應商取得受控產品的 SAFETY Mark。可接受的安全依據為面向手持、可移式及園林工具的 SS/IEC 62841 系列，充電器或外置電源按相關安全標準評估。

standards_or_laws: Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Registration Scheme — SAFETY Mark for Controlled Goods, administered by Enterprise Singapore
SS/IEC 62841 series for hand-held, transportable, and lawn and garden power tools
Relevant SS or IEC charger and power-supply safety standards where the tool ships with a charger or external PSU

summary.en: China power-tool files commonly rely on the GB/T 3883 series as the safety baseline, with CCC certification where the product type is in the China compulsory product list and separate charger standards where applicable. GB/T 3883 evidence should be mapped to Singapore safety expectations rather than treated as automatic SAFETY Mark eligibility.
summary.zh: 中国电动工具文件通常以 GB/T 3883 系列作为安全基线，产品类型在中国强制性产品目录内时加 CCC 认证，并在适用时使用单独的充电器标准。GB/T 3883 证据应映射到新加坡安全预期，而不能作为自动获得 SAFETY Mark 资格。
summary.zht: 中國電動工具文件通常以 GB/T 3883 系列作為安全基線，產品類型在中國強制性產品目錄內時加 CCC 認證，並在適用時使用單獨的充電器標準。GB/T 3883 證據應映射到新加坡安全預期，而不能作為自動取得 SAFETY Mark 資格。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 3883 series (China baseline for power-tool safety)
CCC certification where the product type is listed for compulsory certification
China charger safety standards where applicable

gap.en: The common gap is assuming the China safety report and nominal 220 V design transfer directly. A household tool in scope of the Controlled Goods list needs SAFETY Mark registration through a Singapore-based Registered Supplier, evidence aligned to SS/IEC 62841, and confirmation that the charger or PSU suits 230 V 50 Hz mains.
gap.zh: 常见差距是假设中国安全报告和 220 V 标称设计可直接沿用。属于受控产品清单内的家用工具需通过新加坡本地注册供应商完成 SAFETY Mark 注册、提供与 SS/IEC 62841 对齐的证据，并确认充电器或电源适配 230 V 50 Hz 市电。
gap.zht: 常見差距是假設中國安全報告和 220 V 標稱設計可直接沿用。屬於受控產品清單內的家用工具需透過新加坡本地註冊供應商完成 SAFETY Mark 註冊、提供與 SS/IEC 62841 對齊的證據，並確認充電器或電源適配 230 V 50 Hz 市電。

target.en: Mandatory for a household power tool that falls within the Controlled Goods list: SAFETY Mark registration under the Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Registration Scheme via a Singapore-based Registered Supplier. Industrial tools generally fall outside the controlled-goods list and are not subject to the SAFETY Mark, although general product-safety duties still apply. SS/IEC 62841 is the commonly accepted safety standard route.
target.zh: 对于属于受控产品清单内的家用电动工具为强制：须通过新加坡本地注册供应商在《消费者保护（安全要求）注册计划》下完成 SAFETY Mark 注册。工业工具一般不在受控产品清单内，不受 SAFETY Mark 约束，但一般产品安全义务仍然适用。SS/IEC 62841 是常用的安全标准路径。
target.zht: 對於屬於受控產品清單內的家用電動工具為強制：須透過新加坡本地註冊供應商在《消費者保護（安全要求）註冊計劃》下完成 SAFETY Mark 註冊。工業工具一般不在受控產品清單內，不受 SAFETY Mark 約束，但一般產品安全義務仍然適用。SS/IEC 62841 是常用的安全標準路徑。

cn.en: China domestic baseline commonly uses GB/T 3883 series, with CCC where the product type is listed.
cn.zh: 中国境内基线通常采用 GB/T 3883 系列，产品类型在目录内时加 CCC。
cn.zht: 中國境內基線通常採用 GB/T 3883 系列，產品類型在目錄內時加 CCC。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Conditionally non-compliant for an in-scope household tool until SAFETY Mark registration is held through a Singapore-based Registered Supplier with safety evidence aligned to SS/IEC 62841 and a charger or PSU suited to 230 V 50 Hz. Industrial tools are generally outside the controlled-goods list but still carry general product-safety duties.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对范围内的家用工具，在通过新加坡本地注册供应商持有 SAFETY Mark 注册、安全证据与 SS/IEC 62841 对齐且充电器或电源适配 230 V 50 Hz 之前，不能视为合规。工业工具一般不在受控产品清单内，但仍有一般产品安全义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對範圍內的家用工具，在透過新加坡本地註冊供應商持有 SAFETY Mark 註冊、安全證據與 SS/IEC 62841 對齊且充電器或電源適配 230 V 50 Hz 之前，不能視為合規。工業工具一般不在受控產品清單內，但仍有一般產品安全義務。
